mapper.select: SELECT TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO AS travelPlanNo , TP.TRAVEL_NAME AS travelName , TO_CHAR(TP.TRAVEL_START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS travelStartDt , TO_CHAR(TP.TRAVEL_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS travelEndDt , TT.TRAVEL_THEME_NM AS travelThemeNm , TP.OUTLINE AS outline FROM TRAVEL_PLAN TP LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_THEME TT ON TT.TRAVEL_THEME_CD = TP.TRAVEL_THEME_CD WHERE TP.HOST_MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND (TP.ROOT_TRAVEL_PLAN_NO IS NULL OR TP.ROOT_TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO) ORDER BY TP.REVISION_DT DESC
mapper.sql: TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO AS id , TP.HOST_MEMBER_NO AS hostMemberNo , TP.TRAVEL_NAME AS title , TT.TRAVEL_THEME_NM AS theme , TO_CHAR(TP.TRAVEL_START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate , TO_CHAR(TP.TRAVEL_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDate , TP.OUTLINE AS overview , (TP.TRAVEL_END_DT - TP.TRAVEL_START_DT + 1) AS dayCount , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLAN_GUEST PG WHERE PG.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO) AS guestCount , TO_CHAR(TP.REVISION_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lastEditedAt , (SELECT INVITE_CODE FROM (SELECT INVITE_CODE FROM TRAVEL_INVITATION WHERE TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO AND INVITE_CODE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS inviteCode , NVL(TP.IS_PUBLIC, 0) AS isPublic
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TRAVEL_PLAN TP LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_THEME TT ON TT.TRAVEL_THEME_CD = TP.TRAVEL_THEME_CD WHERE TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo}

SELECT FROM TRAVEL_PLAN TP LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_THEME TT ON TT.TRAVEL_THEME_CD = TP.TRAVEL_THEME_CD WHERE TP.HOST_MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND (TP.ROOT_TRAVEL_PLAN_NO IS NULL OR TP.ROOT_TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO)
AND TT.TRAVEL_THEME_NM = #{theme}
AND TP.TRAVEL_START_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TP.TRAVEL_END_DT <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY TP.REVISION_DT DESC

SELECT FROM TRAVEL_PLAN TP JOIN PLAN_GUEST PG ON PG.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_THEME TT ON TT.TRAVEL_THEME_CD = TP.TRAVEL_THEME_CD WHERE PG.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND TP.HOST_MEMBER_NO != #{memberNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLAN_GUEST_LEAVE PGL WHERE PGL.PLAN_GUEST_NO = PG.PLAN_GUEST_NO )
AND TT.TRAVEL_THEME_NM = #{theme}
AND TP.TRAVEL_START_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TP.TRAVEL_END_DT <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY TP.REVISION_DT DESC
SELECT TRAVEL_THEME_NM FROM TRAVEL_THEME ORDER BY TRAVEL_THEME_CD ASC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PLAN_GUEST PG JOIN TRAVEL_PLAN TP ON TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = PG.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO WHERE PG.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLAN_GUEST_LEAVE L WHERE L.PLAN_GUEST_NO = PG.PLAN_GUEST_NO ) AND TP.TRAVEL_START_DT <= TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TP.TRAVEL_END_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO != #{excludePlanNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT TRAVEL_PLAN_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_PLAN (TRAVEL_PLAN_NO, HOST_MEMBER_NO, TRAVEL_NAME, TRAVEL_THEME_CD, TRAVEL_START_DT, TRAVEL_END_DT, OUTLINE, ROOT_TRAVEL_PLAN_NO, REVISION_DT) VALUES (#{id}, #{hostMemberNo}, #{title}, (SELECT TRAVEL_THEME_CD FROM TRAVEL_THEME WHERE TRAVEL_THEME_NM = #{theme}), TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{overview}, #{id}, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO PLAN_GUEST (PLAN_GUEST_NO, TRAVEL_PLAN_NO, MEMBER_NO) VALUES (PLAN_GUEST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{planNo}, #{memberNo})
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_INVITATION (TRAVEL_INVITATION_NO, INVITE_CODE, TRAVEL_PLAN_NO) VALUES (TRAVEL_INVITATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{inviteCode}, #{planNo})
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_INVITATION (TRAVEL_INVITATION_NO, TRAVEL_PLAN_NO, INVITEE_MEMBER_NO, INVITE_STATUS) VALUES (TRAVEL_INVITATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{planNo}, #{inviteeMemberNo}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT TI.TRAVEL_INVITATION_NO AS invitationNo , TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO AS planNo , TP.TRAVEL_NAME AS planTitle , MA.NICKNAME AS hostNickname , TI.INVITE_STATUS AS inviteStatus , TO_CHAR(TI.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDt FROM TRAVEL_INVITATION TI JOIN TRAVEL_PLAN TP ON TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = TI.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO JOIN MEMBER_ACTIVE MA ON MA.MEMBER_NO = TP.HOST_MEMBER_NO WHERE TI.INVITEE_MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND TI.INVITE_STATUS = 'PENDING' ORDER BY TI.CREATE_DT DESC

SELECT TRAVEL_INVITATION_NO AS invitationNo , TRAVEL_PLAN_NO AS planNo , INVITEE_MEMBER_NO AS inviteeMemberNo , INVITE_STATUS AS inviteStatus FROM TRAVEL_INVITATION WHERE TRAVEL_INVITATION_NO = #{invitationNo}

SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM (SELECT PG.MEMBER_NO FROM PLAN_GUEST PG WHERE PG.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} AND PG.MEMBER_NO != #{hostMemberNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLAN_GUEST_LEAVE PGL WHERE PGL.PLAN_GUEST_NO = PG.PLAN_GUEST_NO ) ORDER BY PG.CREATE_DT ASC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TRAVEL_ITINERARY_HIST WHERE TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO IN ( SELECT TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO FROM TRAVEL_ITINERARY WHERE TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo})
DELETE FROM ITINERARY_EXPENSE WHERE TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO IN ( SELECT TRAVEL_ITINERARY_NO FROM TRAVEL_ITINERARY WHERE TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo})
DELETE FROM PLAN_GUEST_LEAVE WHERE PLAN_GUEST_NO IN ( SELECT PLAN_GUEST_NO FROM PLAN_GUEST WHERE TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo})
DELETE FROM TRAVEL_INVITATION WHERE TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} AND INVITE_CODE IS NOT NULL AND INVITEE_MEMBER_NO IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT PG.MEMBER_NO AS memberId , MA.NICKNAME AS nickname , CASE WHEN TP.HOST_MEMBER_NO = PG.MEMBER_NO THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS host , NVL(PG.CAN_EDIT, 1) AS canEdit , TO_CHAR(PG.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS joinedAt FROM PLAN_GUEST PG JOIN MEMBER_ACTIVE MA ON MA.MEMBER_NO = PG.MEMBER_NO JOIN TRAVEL_PLAN TP ON TP.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = PG.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO WHERE PG.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLAN_GUEST_LEAVE PGL WHERE PGL.PLAN_GUEST_NO = PG.PLAN_GUEST_NO ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN TP.HOST_MEMBER_NO = PG.MEMBER_NO THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, PG.CREATE_DT ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PLAN_GUEST PG WHERE PG.TRAVEL_PLAN_NO = #{planNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLAN_GUEST_LEAVE L WHERE L.PLAN_GUEST_NO = PG.PLAN_GUEST_NO )
SELECT TRAVEL_PLAN_NO FROM TRAVEL_INVITATION WHERE INVITE_CODE = #{inviteCode} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLAN_GUEST_LEAVE (PLAN_GUEST_NO, LEAVE_DATE, LEAVE_TYPE) VALUES (#{planGuestNo}, SYSDATE, #{leaveType})
